meta.title: Traffic AI
meta.description: AI platform for paid traffic management

command.title: Command Center
command.subtitle: Overview of all campaigns and clients
command.compareSubtitle: Compare campaigns across two periods (default: today × yesterday)
command.metricsDbHint: Metrics from the last sync saved in the database
command.metricsLiveCachedHint: Cached Meta data (refreshes every few minutes)
command.compareEmpty: No campaigns to compare in these periods.
command.empty: No campaigns found. Sync Meta in Settings.

alertsPage.title: Alerts
alertsPage.subtitle: Campaigns and clients outside configured goals
alertsPage.emptyHint: When CPL, CPA, ROAS, or budget go off target, alerts show up here. Set goals in the client hub.

automations.title: Automation rules
automations.subtitle: Create rules to monitor metrics and run actions automatically.
automations.selectRule: Select a rule from the list.

campaignsPage.title: Campaigns
campaignsPage.subtitle: Manage all campaigns across your clients.
campaignsPage.metricsDbHint: Metrics from the last sync saved in the database
campaignsPage.metricsLiveCachedHint: Cached Meta data (refreshes every few minutes)
campaignsPage.metricsFromDb: Data from last sync — Refresh from Meta fetches live values.
campaignsPage.enrichRateLimitHint: If this persists, wait 2–5 minutes before refreshing again.
campaignsPage.empty: No campaigns with metrics in this period. Sync Meta or link ad accounts.
campaignsPage.pickSubtitle: Pick a campaign on the left to see the overview with KPIs, chart and ad sets.
campaignsPage.subtitleList: List all campaigns for a client and open details by clicking a row.
campaignsPage.clientScopeHint: Showing campaigns from accounts linked to {client} (scoped to the client's Business Manager).
campaignsPage.pickRowHint: Click a campaign in the table to see KPIs and ad sets below.
campaignsPage.emptyExplain: Publish your first Meta campaign or sync existing accounts. The overview (KPIs, chart and ad sets) appears here once you select a campaign.
campaignsPage.hierarchyNote: On Meta: Campaign → Ad set → Ad. The button above creates all three at once (paused).
campaignsPage.pageSizeHint: Server-side pagination — page changes are fast.
campaignsPage.columnsHint: Pick metrics to show in the table (Ads Manager style).

campaignManager.noChartData: No time series data — run metric sync.
campaignManager.noAdsets: No ad sets in this campaign.
campaignManager.dataNote: Data updates on each sync. Timezone: America/Sao_Paulo.

adsetsPage.title: Ad sets
adsetsPage.subtitle: Manage all ad sets in this campaign
adsetsPage.pickCampaignHint: Choose a campaign from the list on the left.
adsetsPage.empty: No ad sets in this campaign.
adsetsPage.insightBestRoas: Ad set «{name}» had the best ROAS ({roas}) in the period.
adsetsPage.insightTopSpend: «{name}» had the highest spend among ad sets.
adsetsPage.insightPaused: {count} ad set(s) paused — review if they should be reactivated.

auth.loginSubtitle: Use email and password to access the platform. Connect Meta later in Settings.
auth.registerSubtitle: Create an account to explore the MVP. Connect Meta when you need ads and metrics.
auth.name: Name
auth.loginFacebookHint: Automatically imports your Business Managers, ad accounts, and pages.
auth.loginScopes: With Facebook you grant {adsRead} and {adsManagement} and link your Meta account.
auth.metaOptionalHint: Optional at signup — you can also connect later in Settings.
auth.metaNotConfiguredHint: Facebook disabled: set META_APP_ID and META_APP_SECRET in .env (see Settings).

errors.EMAIL_TAKEN: This email is already registered. Try signing in.
errors.REGISTER_LOGIN_FAILED: Account created but sign-in failed. Try logging in.

auth.switchAccountBody: You are signed in as {email}. Sign in with another account to open a separate workspace.
auth.switchAccountHint: Signing in with Facebook will end your current session automatically.

metaOAuth.popupBlocked: The browser blocked the popup. Allow popups for this site and try again.
metaOAuth.oauthFailed: Could not connect to Meta. Please try again.
metaOAuth.closeWindowHint: Return to the main tab to continue.
metaOAuth.redirectingHint: Please wait — the Facebook login will open shortly.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your operation
dashboard.attentionSubtitle: Review and act on the campaigns below.
dashboard.loadError: Failed to load dashboard. Check Postgres and run pnpm run db:migrate.

clientsHub.title: Client hub
clientsHub.subtitle: Centralize Meta accounts and goals per client
clientsHub.deleteConfirm: Remove «{name}» from the platform? Linked accounts, goals, and local history will be deleted.
clientsHub.cannotDeleteDefault: The Default client cannot be deleted.
clientsHub.bulkDeleteConfirm: Remove {count} client(s) from the platform? Linked accounts, goals, and local history will be deleted. This does not change anything in Meta.

createWizard.title: Create client
createWizard.pickBm: Choose the Business Manager to link
createWizard.bmConfirm: On create, all accounts and pages from this BM will be linked automatically to this client.
createWizard.noAccounts: No accounts in this BM. Refresh inventory in Meta Assets.
createWizard.goMetaAssets: Go to Meta Assets and click Refresh from Facebook

sync.hintMemberNoWorkspaceMeta: You are a workspace member: sync uses the administrator's Meta connection. Ask them to connect or reconnect Facebook in Settings.
sync.hintAdminReconnectMeta: Connect or reconnect Facebook in Settings to sync ad accounts.
sync.hintMemberAccountAccess: As a member you don't need to connect your own Meta — but the administrator must still have access to the linked ad account in Ads Manager.

welcome.title: While you were away
welcome.subtitle: Important events since your last logout.

client.onboardingIntro: Traffic AI mirrors what you already use in Meta. Think of it like this:
client.onboardingClient: Client = agency contract (e.g. Clínica Bella). Groups accounts, goals, and campaigns for that business.
client.onboardingAdAccount: Ad account = ad spend wallet in Meta, inside a Business Manager. Link the accounts for this client here.
client.onboardingCampaign: Campaign → Ad set → Ad = structure inside the account. You manage this under Campaigns.
client.onboardingSteps: On this client page, do in order: (1) link ad account(s) → (2) save publishing (page + URL) → (3) goals & alerts → (4) sync.
client.adAccountsHint: Select Meta ad accounts for this client. Filter by Business Manager to find the right account.
client.clientBmHint: Only ad accounts and pages from this BM are shown. Save after changing.
client.noAccounts: No linked accounts — sync with Meta.
client.aiQuickHint: Generate suggestions in AI Center using this client's context.
client.goalsHint: Automatic alerts when limits are exceeded (after sync).
client.deleteConfirm: Remove «{name}» from the platform? This deletes linked accounts, goals, alerts, and local history. It does not change anything in Meta — only in Traffic AI.
client.deleteHint: Use when a contract ends and the client removes your access in Ads Manager.
client.cannotDeleteDefault: The system Default client cannot be deleted.
client.publishHint: Facebook Page and destination URL used when creating campaigns for this client.
client.publishIncomplete: Page and URL are missing — campaigns cannot be published.

aiCenter.title: AI Center
aiCenter.subtitle: Suggestions based on metrics and context
aiCenter.chatHint: E.g. redo ignoring ad set X and be less aggressive on budget
aiCenter.debugHint: Session, period and structured JSON validation.

ads.title: Ad Creator
ads.subtitle: Full Meta campaign (paused for safety)
ads.previewPlaceholder: Ad preview will appear here after selecting media and copy.
ads.adAccountsEmpty: No ad accounts found. Click Sync now at the top or connect Meta in Settings.
ads.adAccountsLoadFailed: Could not load Meta ad accounts.
ads.mediaHint: Images already in your Meta account
ads.publishTargetHint: Page, Instagram and pixel for this ad account. With a single option, it's auto-selected.
ads.audienceHint: Targeting for this ad. Left blank, uses the client defaults.
ads.noClients: No clients yet. Create one in the Clients hub.
ads.publishNotReady: This client does not have a Meta Page and URL configured yet.
ads.missingPage: Set the Meta Page and destination URL in the client profile before publishing.
ads.success: Campaign created (paused). IDs: campaign {campaignId}, ad set {adsetId}, ad {adId}
ads.sidebarSubtitle: Creates campaign + ad set + ad (full structure, paused).
ads.hierarchyHint: Campaign → Ad set → Ad. This flow publishes the full structure at once.

reports.title: Reports
reports.pageSubtitle: Generate professional reports and send them automatically to your clients.
reports.subtitle: White-label PDF + WhatsApp summary

performance.title: Overall performance
performance.desc: Spend, conversions, CPA, ROAS and period alerts.

executive.title: Executive
executive.desc: Summary for leadership with insights and recommendations.

alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.desc: Focus on campaigns and clients needing attention.

reports.pdfSimpleHint: Metrics and alerts for the period — no AI.
reports.whatsappGenerated: Summary generated. Copy below or send to client.
reports.scheduledEmpty: No scheduled sends yet. Create one above.

creatives.title: Creative Library
creatives.subtitle: Organize and manage all creatives across your clients.

audiences.title: Audiences / Lookalike
audiences.subtitle: Create, manage and reuse audiences without leaving Traffic AI.
audiences.metaRequired: Connect your Meta account to list and create audiences.
audiences.stepSourceDesc: Select the data source for your lookalike.
audiences.stepEventDesc: Select the event used in the audience name.
audiences.stepCountryDesc: Set the country where the audience will be created.
audiences.stepRatioDesc: Choose lookalike size (1% is most precise).
audiences.noSeeds: No eligible audience — create a custom audience in Meta first.
audiences.noAudiences: No audiences found on linked accounts.
audiences.tipBody: Smaller lookalikes (1%–3%) are more precise. Start at 1% and scale with results.

pixel.title: Pixel
pixel.desc: People who interacted on your site.

engagement.title: Engagement
engagement.desc: People who engaged with your content.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: White-label, integrations and preferences
settings.publishHint: Each client uses its own Facebook Page and destination URL when creating campaigns.
settings.publishPerClient: Set this under Clients hub → open a client → “Meta publishing” section. The ad creator requires it before publish.
settings.publishEnvFallback: Optional in .env: META_PAGE_ID and META_LINK_URL are only used as fallback when the client has no saved values.
settings.integrationsHint: Global app credentials (OAuth and fallbacks). Prefer page/URL on each client profile.
settings.metaHint: Sign in with Facebook or reconnect here to refresh Business Managers, accounts, and pages.
settings.workspaceMetaHint: A single Meta account powers data for the whole workspace. Other users signing in won't change this connection.
settings.workspaceMetaClaim: Use my account as the workspace connection
settings.workspaceMetaDisconnectConfirm: This removes the official Meta connection and deletes the workspace's stored tokens. Continue?
settings.workspaceMetaClaimNeedsToken: Connect your Meta account above before taking over the workspace connection.
settings.workspaceMetaClaimed: You are now the owner of the workspace Meta connection.
settings.workspaceMetaDisconnected: Workspace Meta connection removed. Connect your account and take over the connection.
settings.workspaceMetaActionFailed: Could not update the workspace connection.
settings.metaSetupRequired: Configure the Meta app in .env before connecting.
settings.metaErrorMissingApp: Meta app not configured. Set META_APP_ID and META_APP_SECRET, then restart the server.
settings.metaErrorProfileMismatch: The Meta account selected differs from your current session. Sign out and sign in with the correct account, or reconnect using the same linked Meta account.
settings.demoDataHint: Removes MVP placeholder clients (Odonto Plus, Loja Fitness, Clínica Bella) and Meta «demo» ad accounts. Does not delete real clients you created.
settings.demoDataNames: e.g. Odonto Plus, Loja Fitness, Clínica Bella
settings.demoDataConfirm: Permanently remove demo clients and demo ad accounts from this workspace?
settings.demoDataDone: Removed {clients} demo client(s) and {accounts} demo ad account(s).
settings.metaSetupTitle: Set up Meta app (required to connect)
settings.metaSetupIntro: The "Invalid App ID" error means META_APP_ID is empty in your .env file.
settings.metaSetupStep2: Under Facebook Login → Settings, add this valid OAuth redirect URI:
settings.metaSetupStep3: Copy App ID and App Secret to .env:
settings.metaSetupStep4: META_APP_ID and META_APP_SECRET (non-empty). Page and ad URL are set per client in the hub — META_PAGE_ID / META_LINK_URL in .env are optional (fallback).
settings.metaSetupStep5: Request ads_read, ads_management, business_management, and pages_show_list. In Development mode, add yourself as a tester. business_management may require App Review in production.
settings.metaSetupRestart: After saving .env, stop pnpm dev (Ctrl+C) and start it again.
settings.teamHint: Invite colleagues to share the same clients and campaigns.
settings.teamInviteSent: Invite created. Copy the link below.

invite.title: Workspace invite
invite.subtitle: Accept the invite to join the team.
invite.missingTokenHint: If you came from Meta login, ask the admin for a new link or open the full URL with ?token=…
invite.preview: Invitation to «{workspace}» (sent to {email}). Any authenticated Meta account can accept this link.
invite.loginRequired: Sign in with Meta to accept the invite.
invite.accepted: Invite accepted. You can use the workspace now.

metaOnboarding.title: Facebook account connected
metaOnboarding.subtitle: Importing your Business Managers, ad accounts, and pages from Meta.
metaOnboarding.discoverFailed: Could not import Meta assets. Reconnect or try again.

metaAssets.title: Meta assets
metaAssets.subtitle: Business Managers, ad accounts, and pages imported from your Facebook account.
metaAssets.discoverFixHint: If active client ad accounts are missing: reconnect Facebook and select all Business Managers and ad accounts in Meta's permission dialog; then click Refresh from Facebook.
metaAssets.bmFilterHint: Filter imported assets by Business Manager.
